title: Android Chrome: Heap overflow in GLES2DecoderPassthroughImpl::DoEndQueryEXT
bounty_rationale: report of memory corruption in a highly-privileged process (GPU)
description_snippet:
# Steps to reproduce the problem
1. Run Android Chrome
2. Open oob.html
3. check crash log using "adb logcat -b crash"

# Problem Description
In "gpu/command_buffer/service/gles2_cmd_decoder_passthrough_doers.cc" `GLES2DecoderPassthroughImpl::DoEndQueryEXT`  will try to erase an "active_queries_" wi
